title: MikroTik QSFP28 optical module XQ+31LC02D, SM, 2km, 100G
description: XQ+31LC02D is a Singlemode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100 Gbps, 4 channels, wavelengths 1271nm, 1291nm, 1311nm, 1331nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 2 km . The module is compatible with all active elements from MikroTik and also with devices of other manufacturers "cisco compatibile" with QSFP28 port The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions, including optical power monitoring, and will perform well in environments up to 70° C. It has been designed to meet the harshest conditions, including temperature, humidity, and EMI interference, so we definitely recommend this as a reliable solution for all your 100 Gbps QSFP28 devices
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1271 to 1331 Distance [km] 2 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
